display_text: Ash Legion Shield. Tier 1 Neutral Item: Activate to reduce your own movement speed by 12% and grant a 140 physical damage barrier to all friendly player-controlled units within an 800 radius for 6 seconds. This provides a strong defensive tool for team pushes or protecting a group of summons from physical damage, but comes at the cost of personal mobility. Stats: CD: 40s, Barrier: 140, Radius: 800, Duration: 6s, Slow: 12%.
